# Pantograph

## Live Text

- Description: At the start of each Boss combat, heal 25 HP.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.
     Wiki facts live above the divider. -->
- Strong late Act 3 pickup when boss HP is uncertain; can justify smithing the final rest site instead of resting if hallway/elite damage is controlled.
- At the final campfire, add the 25 HP boss heal before deciding Rest vs Smith; a near-full boss entry can make an upgrade stronger than a redundant heal.
